endpoints.name: Get the most recent financial overview for the specified individual or organisation.

parameters.name: EntityKey
parameters.description: Must be UserKey if EntityType=Individual or ClientKey if EntityType=Organisation

parameters.name: EntityType
parameters.description: An individual person or organisation

endpoints.name: Update the financial overview for the specified individual or organisation.

parameters.name: Assets
parameters.description: Assets held.

parameters.name: BenchmarkDebtFactor
parameters.description: BenchmarkDebtFactor is used in the loss ability calculation and is set by the FI depending on the clients situation.

parameters.name: BenchmarkIncomeAfterExpenses
parameters.description: Benchmark benchmark income of a retail household after taxes and fixed costs has been deducted.

parameters.name: CorporateFiscalYear
parameters.description: The year of the annual statement used as the source for the numbers entered in this financial overview.

parameters.name: CorporateGuidelinesForInvesting
parameters.description: True, if there are any mandatory guideline for investing that the organisation must follow, for example if it's a charity or a non profit.

parameters.name: Currency
parameters.description: Currency of the financial overview.

parameters.name: DebtFactor
parameters.description: Ratio of debt of a retail household divided by households yearly salary before taxes.

parameters.name: EntityKey
parameters.description: Must be UserKey if EntityType=Individual or ClientKey if EntityType=Organisation

parameters.name: EntityType
parameters.description: An individual person or organisation

parameters.name: Equity
parameters.description: Corporate client's liquid cash

parameters.name: ExpectedEconomicChanges
parameters.description: True, If the organisation expects big changes in it's financial situation, for example if they need to buy or sell any key assets.

parameters.name: Expenses
parameters.description: Fixed expenses.

parameters.name: IlliquidAssets
parameters.description: Amount of assets that are difficult to convert into cash in market.

parameters.name: Income
parameters.description: Income before taxes.

parameters.name: IncomeAfterExpenses
parameters.description: Income after taxes and fixed costs have been deducted.

parameters.name: Liabilities
parameters.description: Liabilities

parameters.name: LiquidAssets
parameters.description: Amount of assets that can be easily converted to cash or other assets into the market.

parameters.name: NetIncome
parameters.description: Corporate client's net income

parameters.name: NewCompany
parameters.description: Newly founded company without it's first annual statement

parameters.name: PensionAfterTaxes
parameters.description: Retail client's pension after taxes has been deducted.
